prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为3338→3357→2609→1572→1619，整体呈显著上升趋势（位次数字大幅减小），2023年起跃升至2600名以内，近两年稳定在1600名左右高位；2025年基准位次约1619名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为23人，2023年25人，2024年27人，2025年增至30人；2026年计划骤降至19人，较2025年缩招约36.7%，名额大幅减少将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享哈工大办学资源；软科中国大学排名中哈工大2026年位列主榜第12名（全国Top20），学校层次极高；2026年高考周期内哈工大声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温；未见投档断档记录；哈工大第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科超10个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A、电气工程A等，工科实力全国顶尖；威海校区招生专业覆盖计算机、人工智能、自动化、通信、电气等优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会关注度极高；重庆物理类考生2021–2025年分别为98954→112556→120872→132325→139478，持续增长，2026年总考生209000人，估算物理类约133760人，较2025年略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；哈工大（威海）位于山东省，非重庆本地高校，但作为C9层次顶尖985，跨省吸引力强；该校在重庆招生占比约2.5%（2025年），属中等偏低，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅缩招（30→19，-36.7%）带来的竞争加剧效应，以及学校层次极高、抖音高热、专业热度持续升温等正面因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年（1619名）有所前移（更难进），但缩招幅度过大使，经综合修正后预测最低位次约1313名，区间1163–1463名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈尔滨工业大学（威海）在重庆物理类仅设工科试验班（未来信息）一个招生专业大类，内部包含计算机、人工智能、自动化、通信、电气等热门方向，入校后任选专业。位次在预测区间1163–1463名内建议积极报考，位次优于区间上限可重点选择计算机科学与技术、人工智能等一档方向；位次接近区间下限可优先考虑自动化、电气工程等二档方向作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 3338 → 3357 → 2609 → 1572 → 1619, showing a significant upward trend (ranking numbers greatly decreased). Since 2023, it jumped to within 2600, and in the last two years stabilized around 1600; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 1619. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 23 in 2021–2022, 25 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and increased to 30 in 2025; in 2026, the plan sharply drops to 19, a reduction of about 36.7% compared to 2025, and the significant decrease in slots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing HIT's educational resources; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, HIT ranked 12th in the main list in 2026 (top 20 nationally), indicating an extremely high university level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, HIT's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin school popularity total ranking is 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; no records of admission gaps were found; HIT has over 10 disciplines rated A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A, Electrical Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength nationwide; the Weihai campus offers majors covering advantageous directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Communication, and Electrical Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with extremely high social attention; Chongqing Physics Category examinees from 2021 to 2025 were 98954 → 112556 → 120872 → 132325 → 139478, continuously increasing, and in 2026 the total examinees are 209000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 133760, a slight decrease from 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. HIT (Weihai) is located in Shandong Province, not a local university in Chongqing, but as a top-tier 985 at the C9 level, it has strong cross-provincial appeal; its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), moderately low, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the intensified competition effect from the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (30→19, -36.7%), along with positive factors such as extremely high university level, high Douyin heat, and continuously rising major popularity, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025 (1619). However, due to the large reduction scale, after comprehensive correction, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1313, with a range of 1163–1463.

- Artificial Intelligence (Engineering Pilot Class Future Information Direction).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) only offers one major category, Engineering Pilot Class (Future Information), in Chongqing Physics Category, which includes popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Communication, and Electrical Engineering, with free major selection after enrollment. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 1163–1463 are advised to actively apply; those with rankings better than the upper limit can focus on Tier 1 directions like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence; those with rankings near the lower limit can prioritize Tier 2 directions such as Automation and Electrical Engineering as a safe choice.
